Good morning, Graziele. Can I ask about your day?
Of course! My daily routine starts early.
What time do you arrive at the hospital?
I arrive at seven and I start my shift.
That is early! What do you do first?
First, I check the schedule for the doctors.
Do you take a break during the day?
Yes, I take a short break for lunch.
And what time do you finish?
I finish my shift at five. It is a busy day!

Hello Graziele. Let me tell you about my routine. I arrive at the hospital at eight. I start with the morning meeting. Then I visit my patients on the third floor. At noon, I take a short break for lunch. In the afternoon, I work in my office. I finish at six. It is a long day, but I love my work.

Hi Graziele, this is Ana. Here is the plan for today. The team meeting starts at eight. The doctors arrive at nine. We have a short break at eleven. The big group meeting is in the afternoon. We finish at five today. Have a great day!
Graziele arrives at the hospital at seven. She starts her shift. She checks the schedule for the doctors. At noon, she takes a short break. At five, she finishes her day.
